title: Invisible Totem Left Hand Only
description: Makes Totem Invisible While Holding In Left Hand.
body:
# Invisible Totem By SIlent!
"Makes the Totem of Undying invisible when held in the left hand but fully visible in the right hand. Keeps normal textures in inventory and dropped form for a clean PvP experience."

---

### ⚠️ Compatibility Note
- Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only
- Not Tested with Mods
